results.title: Populist to face outgoing president’s candidate in Colombian run-off election
results.description: Conservative Abelardo de la Espriella won most votes against leftist senator Iván Cepeda in close poll

results.title: Migration Boom, Latino Backlash Jolts Texas Senate Race
results.description: Axios: “Texas has gained more than 2.5 million new residents since 2020 — roughly the entire population of New Mexico — reshaping the electorate and injecting new uncertainty into this year’s marquee Senate race.” “Republican Ken Paxton is favored to defeat Democrat James Talarico in November, but the influx of new arrivals — along with [...]
